prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-3PCGARDTOOLS-HM-75968-72 Product Type: GARDEN_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 3pc Handheld Gardening Tools Set Rake Hoe Shovel Garden Supplies Description: Are you an avid gardener or just getting started? This set of 3 handheld gardening tools from ToolTreaux comes with 3 essential tools used to remove garden debris, as well as to level and grade your garden soil before plants or seeds are planted in your garden, herb garden, flowerpot, plant pot, or succulent planter.

Inside this set, you'll find 3 common gardening tools that every gardener needs to ensure they have a healthy garden: a hoe, a rake, and a shovel/trowel. These tools are specifically designed to help dig, plant, and cultivate your garden. The hoe is perfect for weeding and chopping soil, the rake for leveling and grading, and the shovel for digging and aerating.

All 3 of our gardening tools feature an ergonomic handle to provide comfort during use, and the soft foam wrap adds grip and helps prevent slippage to protect your inner palm and wrist while gardening and planting. The tools themselves are made of steel to ensure a long service life, and the materials are weather-resistant so you can garden rain or shine.

To properly clean your garden tools, just rinse them and dry them once done and store them in a dry place to increase longevity. Whether you're an experienced gardener or trying a new hobby, this is a must-have set of essential gardening tools. Search Terms: gardening hand tools gardening gifts gardening kit plant lover gifts landscaping tools weeding tool weeding tools gardening patio tools gardening accessories rake garden tools rakes leaf rake landscaping tools gardening tools hand tools for Features: - 3PC GARDENING TOOLS SET - ToolTreaux 3pc garden tools set comes with 3 handheld essential tools for removing gardening debris, grading and leveling your garden to prepare for planting and planting seeds; Ideal set for growing flowers, herbs, succulents, and more - MULTI-USE HANDHELD TOOLS - Set comes with 3 common gardening tools designed to help dig, plant, and cultivate your garden: a hoe for weeding and chopping soil, a rake for leveling and grading, and a shovel/trowel for digging and aerating - ERGONOMIC HANDLE - All 3 gardening tools feature an ergonomic handle to provide comfort during use; Soft foam wrap adds grip and helps prevent slippage to protect your inner palm and wrist while gardening and planting - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - All hand tools have a wooden handle with steelhead construction to ensure a long service life; Materials are water-resistant so you can garden rain or shine; Rinse and dry garden cultivator tools once done and store in a dry place to increase longevity - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: wood (handle); steel (tool head); Color: black; Set size: 3 pieces (hoe, rake, shovel); Soft foam grip wrap on handle === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
